arts.ttl: Man City 3-3 Feyenoord: Pep Guardiola's side suffer astonishing late collapse as their winless run rumbles on ahead of crucial clash with Liverpool... as Dutch giants triumph despite Erling Haaland netting a brace
arts.sum: JACK GAUGHAN: Will they ever win again? Manchester City found a new avenue into ignominy last night. Three goals up with 15 minutes to play. Thrown away in 15 minutes.

arts.ttl: Bellingham: “Liverpool are one of the form teams, but there's a lot of confidence in our dressing room”
arts.sum: Jude Bellingham spoke to the media in the Anfield press room ahead of the Liverpool- Real Madrid league-phase clash on matchday five of the Champions League (Wednesday, 9 pm CET): “In the dressing room and on the bus there is a lot of confidence. I've scored in the last two games and it's good to contribute with goals.

arts.ttl: When is Liverpool - Real Madrid? how to watch on TV, stream online
arts.sum: The game between Liverpool - Real Madrid will be played on Wednesday November 27 at Anfield, with kick off at 3:00 p.m. ET / 12:00 p.m. PT . Form guide for Liverpool - Real Madrid

arts.ttl: When is Liverpool - Man City?how to watch on TV, stream online
arts.sum: The game between Liverpool - Man City will be played on Sunday December 1 at Anfield with kick off at 11:00 a.m. ET / 8:00 a.m. PT. Liverpool comes into this match in excellent form, having won their last seven games across all competitions.

arts.ttl: Barcelona & Real Madrid legends in attendance at Barca’s UCL clash

arts.ttl: Liverpool vs. Southampton: Arne Slot's Reds Premier League title favourites ahead of Pep Guardiola's Manchester City
arts.sum: Liverpool's win against Southampton highlights why they are ready to be champions and why they are clear favourites for the Premier League title ahead of Manchester City.

arts.ttl: Mohamed Salah contract future: Update as Jamie Carragher labels Liverpool winger "selfish" for Southampton comments
arts.sum: Mohamed Salah's contract situation is clarified amidst controversy surrounding his comments in the aftermath of Liverpool's win against Southampton in the Premier League.
